problem id: b1b5054f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  01110100 -> 10111101
  00111001 -> 11000110
  11001011 -> 01101010
  11010111 -> 10001101
  01101010 -> 01001010
  11010100 -> 10010101
  10000110 -> 00010001
  11110101 -> 10010101
  00001101 -> 01101011

query: 10000000
predicted answer: 00100000
